corrections_by_claim.note: The article mentions AI processors and semiconductor production, but does not analyze the nature of the investment (productive vs. rent-seeking).
No engagement with the mechanism of search/social platform profitability.
The state action described is punitive/regulatory (blacklisting), not constitutive of the firm's market dominance or business model.
No discussion of profit rates or surplus appropriation.
No balance-sheet or asset composition analysis.
No engagement with the theoretical debate on expropriation vs. exploitation.
